predicates.name: has_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company has legal personality (a background factual status directly assertable from case facts).

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual average employee criterion in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover criterion in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total criterion in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the three criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year.

predicates.name: no_longer_exceeds_more_than_one_criterion_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company no longer exceeds more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year.

predicates.name: previous_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year is immediately before the first financial year.

predicates.name: next_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year is immediately after the first financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company as defined by the law in the given financial year.

predicates.name: small_company_status_takes_effect_from
predicates.description: The change in small company status takes effect from this financial year following the second consecutive year in which the criteria change occurred.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding value added tax of the company in the financial year, in euros.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in euros.
